name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-56
title: Spec file Update attempted without prior Read during TDD/feature-touch causing repeated 'File must be read first' errors
description: During rabbit-feature-touch and TDD cycles, the error '● Update(.claude/features/tdd-subagent/docs/spec/spec.md) ⎿ File must be read first' is printed many times. The TDD subagent or rabbit-feature-touch orchestration is attempting to call the Edit/Update tool on a spec file without first issuing a Read, which Claude Code's harness rejects on every attempt. The fix must ensure spec files are read before any edit is attempted. Scoped to tdd-subagent (where the spec file lives) and rabbit-feature (touch orchestration).

history.note: Scope correction: misfired Edit-without-Read happens in rabbit-feature-spec skill (owned by rabbit-feature), not in TDD subagent (whose SPEC-READ Step 1 already mandates reading the spec). Refiling under rabbit-feature.
